title: althenia tzvelevii
intro: Althenia tzvelevii, also known as the Altai althenia, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in mountainous regions of Asia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Althenia tzvelevii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Althenia tzvelevii typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, or topical applications.
